title: EmptyState
description: Empty state for lists, searches and data-less sections. Supports icon, description, actions and visual variants.

playground.title: No notifications
playground.description: When you receive something it will appear here.

action.title: With action
action.desc: Actions slot for adding a CTA below the description.
action.emptyDesc: Try a different search or clear the filters.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three surfaces: subtle (default), solid (with border) and outline (dashed border).

noResults.title: No results
noResults.desc: Typical pattern for a search with no matches.
noResults.emptyDesc: We couldn't find anything matching "invoices 2025". Try other terms.

error.title: Error state
error.desc: Combine variant outline with a CTA to retry the operation.
error.emptyDesc: Please retry in a few seconds.

props.title: Main heading of the empty state.
props.icon: Icon shown above the title. Defaults to InboxIcon.
props.size: Visual size of the empty state.
props.radius: Corner radius for solid or outline variants.

slots.default: Extra content rendered at the end of the empty state.

types.title: EmptyState
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the EmptyState component props. Includes EmptyStateSize and EmptyStateVariant union types for size and visual treatment.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaRegion: Uses role region to identify the empty state as a navigable landmark
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the empty state region
a11y.focusNative: Actions inside the empty state are focusable; the container itself is not
